channel.title: GrantFinder - Latest Nonprofit Grants
channel.description: The latest nonprofit grant opportunities from federal, state, and private sources. Updated daily.

item.title: NEA Our Town
item.description: Grants for projects that strengthen the social, cultural, and economic vitality of communities through the arts. | Funding: $25,000 - $200,000 | Deadline: 2026-07-15 | Category: Arts & Culture

item.title: NSF STEM Education
item.description: Funds innovative projects to improve STEM education at all levels. Supports curriculum development, teacher professional development, and research on STEM learning. | Funding: $100,000 - $1,000,000 | Deadline: 2026-08-15 | Category: Education

item.title: NIH Research Project Grants (R01)
item.description: Core NIH grant mechanism supporting research projects across all disease areas and biomedical research topics. | Funding: $250,000 - $2,000,000 | Deadline: Rolling | Category: Research

item.title: DOE Energy Efficiency and Renewable Energy
item.description: Funds research, development, and deployment of clean energy technologies including solar, wind, geothermal, and energy storage. | Funding: $500,000 - $5,000,000 | Deadline: 2026-09-15 | Category: Environment

item.title: Ford Foundation - Expanding Opportunities
item.description: Supports efforts to expand economic opportunity for low-income individuals through education, workforce development, and financial security. | Funding: $100,000 - $2,000,000 | Deadline: Rolling | Category: Social Services

item.title: Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation - Education
item.description: Funds programs improving student learning and college access in U.S. schools and globally. | Funding: $500,000 - $10,000,000 | Deadline: Rolling | Category: Education

item.title: Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation - Global Health
item.description: Supports programs to improve health outcomes globally, focusing on infectious diseases, maternal health, and health systems strengthening. | Funding: $1,000,000 - $50,000,000 | Deadline: Rolling | Category: Health

item.title: Google.org AI for Social Good
item.description: Funds nonprofits using artificial intelligence and machine learning to address social and environmental challenges. | Funding: $50,000 - $3,000,000 | Deadline: Rolling | Category: Technology

item.title: Bloomberg Philanthropies - Environment
item.description: Funds climate action, clean energy transition, and environmental management initiatives globally. | Funding: $500,000 - $20,000,000 | Deadline: Rolling | Category: Environment

item.title: Moore Foundation - Science
item.description: Funds scientific research advancing understanding of nature and solving complex environmental challenges. | Funding: $500,000 - $10,000,000 | Deadline: Rolling | Category: Research
